name: code-monitor
description: Watch for new commits matching Sourcegraph search queries and send alerts via webhooks. Aligned with Sourcegraph Enterprise Code Monitoring GraphQL API.

create.description: Create a new code monitor (maps to createCodeMonitor)

query.description: Sourcegraph search query (should include type:diff or type:commit)

webhook.description: Webhook URL to POST alerts to (e.g., Slack incoming webhook)

interval.description: Check interval in minutes (default: 15, informational only)

update.description: Update a monitor's query, webhook, or interval (maps to updateCodeMonitor)

name.description: Name of the monitor to update

delete.description: Delete a monitor and its event history (maps to deleteCodeMonitor)

name.description: Name of the monitor to delete

toggle.description: Enable or disable a monitor (maps to toggleCodeMonitor)

name.description: Name of the monitor to toggle

enabled.description: Set to 'true' to enable or 'false' to disable

trigger_check.description: Evaluate trigger query for a specific monitor (maps to trigger evaluation concept)

name.description: Specific monitor to check (if omitted, checks all)

since.description: Override 'since' time in ISO8601 format (default: last check time from DB)

trigger_check_all.description: Evaluate trigger queries for all enabled monitors

list.description: List all monitors with their status (via currentUser.monitors pattern)

events.description: Show recent trigger events for a monitor (maps to MonitorTriggerEventConnection)

limit.description: Maximum number of events to show (default: 20)

test_action.description: Send a test webhook for a monitor (maps to triggerTestWebhookAction)

name.description: Name of the monitor to test

reset.description: Reset trigger timestamps to re-evaluate from scratch (maps to resetTriggerQueryTimestamps)

name.description: Name of the monitor to reset

health.description: Check Sourcegraph connectivity and database state
